summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to Azerbaijan from China must pass UN 38.3 testing per the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, using the standard test set and reporting structure for T1 to T8. Classification, packing, and carriage documentation must match the chosen mode and carrier requirements. Azerbaijan transport acceptance at Baku follows international dangerous-goods logic with UN numbers and Class 9 labelling where applicable.
summary.zh: 从中国运往阿塞拜疆的锂电池/电芯必须按UN试验和标准手册完成UN 38.3测试，涵盖T1至T8。分类、包装和运输文件应按运输方式与承运人要求匹配。阿塞拜疆在巴库口岸接收运输通常执行危险品通用规则，包括UN编号与第9类标识。
summary.zht: 從中國運往阿塞拜疆的鋰電池／電芯須按聯合國試驗與標準手冊完成UN 38.3測試，涵蓋T1至T8。分類、包裝及運輸文件應按運輸方式與承運人要求匹配。阿塞拜疆在巴庫口岸接收運輸通常執行危險品通用規則，包括UN編號與第9類標識。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3
UN Model Regulations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods
Dangerous goods carrier documentation requirements for sea and air modes

summary.en: China also applies UN 38.3 as the baseline for dangerous-goods exports and uses the same UN numbering and Class 9 framework in international transport. Therefore the technical test framework itself is largely aligned.
summary.zh: 中国也以UN 38.3作为危险品出口基线，并在国际运输中执行同一UN编号和第9类体系，因此技术测试框架本身基本一致。
summary.zht: 中國也以UN 38.3作為危險品出口基線，並在國際運輸中執行同一UN編號和第9類體系，故技術測試框架本身基本一致。

gap.en: The gap is usually administrative: ensuring consignee, Baku entry point, and operator-facing documentation (DGD, declarations, labeling, and packing marks) are complete for Azerbaijani shipment acceptance.
gap.zh: 差距通常体现在管理层面，即保证收货人信息、巴库入境点及承运人文件（危险品申报、标签、包装标识）完整，满足当地受理要求。
gap.zht: 差距通常體現在管理層面，即保證收貨人資訊、巴庫入境點及承運人文件（危險品申報、標籤、包裝標識）完整，滿足當地受理要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for all relevant lithium battery exports because they are dangerous goods under international transport rules and must meet UN 38.3 and documentation obligations.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for lithium battery exports from China in current logistics channels; transport compliance is already a core export requirement.

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — Manual of Tests and Criteria

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Transport requirements are largely harmonised between China and Azerbaijan at the UN 38.3 level, but document handover at entry still must be correct. Confirm Baku consignee and dangerous-goods routing before first shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在UN 38.3层面中中亚两端规则大体一致，但入境文件衔接仍需准确。首次发运前务必确认巴库收货人信息和危险品运输路由。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在UN 38.3層面中國與阿塞拜疆規則大體一致，但入境文件銜接仍需準確。首次發運前務必確認巴庫收貨人資訊和危險品運輸路由。
